code: import React from'react';import CategoryPage from'./CategoryPage';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const Insecticides=()=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CategoryPage,{category:"insecticides",title:"Insecticides",icon:"\uD83D\uDC1B",description:"Broad-spectrum and targeted insecticide solutions to protect your crops from harmful pests at every growth stage."});export const Weedicides=()=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CategoryPage,{category:"weedicides",title:"Weedicides & Herbicides",icon:"\uD83C\uDF3F",description:"Pre-emergence and post-emergence weed control solutions for all major crops including wheat, rice, and cotton."});export const Fungicides=()=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CategoryPage,{category:"fungicides",title:"Fungicides",icon:"\uD83C\uDF44",description:"Protect your crops from fungal diseases with our comprehensive range of contact and systemic fungicides."});export const PGR=()=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CategoryPage,{category:"pgr",title:"Plant Growth Regulators",icon:"\uD83C\uDF31",description:"Scientifically formulated PGRs to regulate plant growth, improve yield potential, and enhance overall crop quality."});export const Granules=()=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CategoryPage,{category:"granules",title:"Granules & Fertilizers",icon:"\u2699\uFE0F",description:"High-quality granular fertilizers with essential macro and micronutrients for sustained plant nutrition throughout the season."});
